explanation: This command simulates the execution of AdvancedRun.exe with parameters that match the Sigma rule. It includes the required flags and arguments in a standard format.
This command uses substitution of '/' with '-' for flag syntax, which is a common equivalent in command-line tools, while maintaining the same functionality and matching the Sigma rule.
This command uses path normalization (single backslashes instead of double backslashes) and omits unnecessary escape characters where not required, while still matching the Sigma rule.
This command reorders the arguments, which is acceptable if the program accepts arguments in any order, while still matching the Sigma rule.
